summary: Hermes reused an operator-provided authenticated Chrome session and completed a direct 1688 partial run, producing one credible supplier with direct search, product, and supplier-page evidence.

limitations: the run depended on an operator-provided authenticated Chrome session rather than an automated login flow
only one supplier was validated before Hermes reached the maximum-iteration limit
the raw Hermes transcript included a banner and session trailer, so the canonical Markdown report was normalized before persistence
